vocab.meaning: đường chân trời bị xáo trộn (do quá nhiều nhà cao tầng)
vocab.example: The once clear view of the horizon has been replaced by a cluttered skyline of high-rise developments.

vocab.meaning: những tòa nhà đồ sộ, khổng lồ và đồng nhất
vocab.example: My neighborhood is now surrounded by monolithic structures that feel a bit imposing compared to the older villas.

vocab.meaning: cao chọc trời (đâm xuyên những đám mây)
vocab.example: In the central business district nearby, several glass towers literally seem to pierce the clouds on foggy mornings.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm dân cư (khu vực tập trung nhiều chung cư cao tầng)
vocab.example: The area has evolved into a major residential hub, characterized by dozens of 40-story apartment blocks.

vocab.meaning: đổ bóng dài (nghĩa bóng: gây ảnh hưởng lớn; nghĩa đen: che khuất ánh sáng)
vocab.example: The skyscraper across the street is so tall that it casts a long shadow over our garden for most of the afternoon.

vocab.meaning: làm từ kính và thép (phong cách kiến trúc hiện đại)
vocab.example: I live in a modern district dominated by glass-and-steel edifices that reflect the sunlight beautifully.

vocab.meaning: lối sống trong các căn hộ cao tầng (sống theo chiều dọc)
vocab.example: Due to land scarcity, vertical living has become the norm in my vicinity, with very few landed houses left.

vocab.meaning: tòa nhà chọc trời với công nghệ hiện đại nhất
vocab.example: A state-of-the-art skyscraper was recently completed just two blocks away, housing both offices and a luxury mall.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị cản trở
vocab.example: If you live on the top floors of these tall buildings, you can enjoy an unobstructed vista of the entire city.
The addition of these sleek tall buildings has significantly improved the urban aesthetics of our previously dull district.
